titleStmt.title: SII 24.287: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 287. (A.R. No. 47 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers the gift of a Kalmaḍam at the centre of the western portion of the north Vikramachōḷaṉ-tiruvīdi to Pradhāṉi Viṭṭhappar, son of Apparāju of the Bhāradvāja-gōtra, when he restored the Tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam lands to the temple at Śrīraṅgam with the help of Vīra Kampaṇa Uḍaiyar, son of Vīra Bukkaṇṇa Uḍaiyar. The details of the date viz., Pramādi, Vaikāśi, Paurṇamī, Monday, Viśākha, correspond regularly to A.D. 1373, May 11, Friday (not Monday), f.d.t. ·42; ·87.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīmat mahāmaṇṟaḷeśvaran Arirāyavibhāṭan bhāṣaikkut tappumrāya
ra kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyarakaṇṭaṉ śrīvīrapukkaṇṇa Uṭaiyar kumārar śrīvīra kampa
ṇṇa Uṭaiyar prathivi rājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa pramāti samvatsarattu vai
kāci māsattu pūrṇaiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa vicākattunāḷ teṉkarai
pāṇṭikulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḷā nāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppatiyil vaṭakkil vi
kkiṟamacoḻaṉ tiruvītiyil meltuṇṭattu naṭuvaṭaiya kalmaṭam
Oṉṟum śrīmatu bhāradvāja gotrattu Āpastampasūtrattu Apparāju ma
kaṉ pradhāṉi viṭṭappar kampaṇa Uṭaiyaraik koṇṭu perumāḷukku veṇṭu
n tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamum viṭuvittu koyilukku veṇṭum naṉmaiyum ce
yvikkaiyil perumāḷ Ivarkku Udakapūrvamākak kuṭutta In
ta kalmaṭam Oṉṟum Ivarkku dāṉādhamana vikkiṟayaṅ
kaḷukkum Urittāvatākavum Ippaṭikku Udakapūrva dha
rmma dānamākak kuṭuttom . Itu Ivarkku cantrādi
ttavaraiyum cellak kaṭavatākavum §
Digital edition of SII 24.287 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
